Package me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags

package me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Contains concrete implementations of Tag representing all currently supported Named Binary Tag (NBT) types.

Each class in this package corresponds to a specific TagType and is responsible for handling its own value storage, serialization, deserialization, and cloning.

Primitive tags store single values (e.g., int, byte), while array tags store sequences of primitive values.

More complex structures such as list and compound tags may be added in future versions.

Since:
1.0.1
Author:
ItzLoghotXD
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.itzloghotxd.nbt
    Provides the core classes and interfaces for the Named Binary Tag (NBT) library.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ByteArrayTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding an array of byte values.
    ByteTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single byte value.
    CompoundTag
    Represents an NBT compound tag that contains a collection of Tags.
    DoubleTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single double value.
    FloatTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single float value.
    IntegerArrayTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding an array of int values.
    IntegerTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single int value.
    ListTag<E extends Tag<?>>
     
    LongArrayTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding an array of long values.
    LongTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single long value.
    ShortTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single short value.
    StringTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a String value.
